text: Péter Magyar: Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. Probably, if he had been woken from his sleep, he would have said that he won the US presidential election, not Donald Trump. Viktor Orbán talked about everything except for the problems affecting the Hungarian people.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：维克多·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。如果他从睡梦中被叫醒，他可能会说他赢得了美国总统大选，而不是唐纳德·特朗普。维克多·欧尔班谈论了一切，唯独没有谈论影响匈牙利人民的问题。

text: ELINT News RT @ShalomLipner : "Pakistani, Egyptian & Turkish mediators will continue talks with the US & Iran in coming days in an effort to bridge remaining gaps... mediators hope narrowing the gaps could enable another round of negotiations before the ceasefire expires." @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/13/us-iran-nuclear-talks-ceasefire-deal tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @ShalomLipner：“巴基斯坦、埃及和土耳其的调解人将在未来几天继续与美国和伊朗进行会谈，努力弥合剩余的分歧……调解人希望缩小分歧能促成在停火协议到期前进行新一轮谈判。” @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/13/us-iran-nuclear-talks-ceasefire-deal 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @DefenseBulletin : Keeping this in mind, it’s now just under two hours before the U.S. blockade of vessels leaving Iranian ports and vessels paying tolls to Iran is set to begin. According to Barak Ravid, citing a senior U.S. official, following the failed U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, mediators from Turkey, Pakistan, And Egypt will continue talks with their U.S. counterparts in an attempt to find points of convergence between the U.S. and Iranian sides. Per the report, mediators, who still believe a lasting ceasefire is possible, hope to realize the aforementioned goals before the ceasefire deadline on April 12, 2026. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @DefenseBulletin：请记住这一点，距离美国封锁离开伊朗港口的船只以及向伊朗支付过路费的船只的行动开始，现在只剩下不到两个小时了。据巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）援引一位美国高级官员的话称，在美伊伊斯兰堡会谈失败后，来自土耳其、巴基斯坦和埃及的调解人将继续与美国同行进行会谈，试图找到美伊双方的共识点。据报道，仍然相信持久停火是可能的调解人希望在2026年4月12日停火截止日期前实现上述目标。- OSINTdefender 推文

Per the report, mediators, who still believe a lasting ceasefire is possible, hope to realize the aforementioned goals before the ceasefire deadline on April 12, 2026. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Turkish foreign Minister Fidan essentially says the U.S. has no agency: "Israel is not a structure that produces power on its own. There is a mindset here that has managed to hack the American political system through Zionism. What the United States does in this region does not serve its own interests, but benefits Israel. So why does the United States do this? It is not a rational model of behavior. It happens when you influence (American) politics." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）土耳其外交部长菲丹（Fidan）实质上表示美国没有自主权：“以色列不是一个能独立产生权力的结构。这里有一种心态，通过犹太复国主义成功黑进了美国政治体系。美国在这个地区所做的事情并不服务于其自身利益，而是让以色列受益。那么美国为什么要这样做呢？这不是一种理性的行为模式。当你影响（美国）政治时，这种情况就会发生。” 推文

text: ELINT News RT @manniefabian : As the American military is set to begin a naval blockade on Iran in two hours, the IDF says it remains on “heightened alert” for any development. The Israeli military says there are no changes in the Home Front Command’s guidelines for civilians as of yet, and it remains ready to return to fighting in Iran if necessary. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian：随着美军准备在两小时后开始对伊朗实施海上封锁，以色列国防军（IDF）表示，对任何事态发展保持“高度警惕”。以军表示，目前后方司令部对平民的指导方针没有变化，并随时准备在必要时重返伊朗作战。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT ELINT News RT @manniefabian : The Israeli military has nearly completed capturing the Hezbollah stronghold of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon, killing more than 100 members of the terror group in the area in the process, according to the IDF. The operation in Bint Jbeil is being led by the 98th Division with its Paratroopers and Commando brigades, along with the Givati Infantry Brigade. The IDF says it initially isolated and encircled the town to prevent Hezbollah from bringing in reinforcements or escaping. At least 150 Hezbollah operatives, including members of the terror group's elite Radwan Force, were estimated by the IDF to have been in the Bint Jbeil area ahead of the operation. The 98th Division also carried out several commando operations as it worked to secure the town, a military official says. "Over the past week, the forces completed the encirclement and launched an offensive in the town of Bint Jbeil," the IDF says in a statement. "The troops eliminated more than 100 terrorists from the Hezbollah terror organization in close-quarters combat and from the air, destroyed dozens of terrorist infrastructures, and located hundreds of weapons in the area," the IDF says. Since the IDF began its offensive in Bint Jbeil, the military has not detected any attacks from the town on Israel. IDF troops, however, have come under fire by Hezbollah from Bint Jbeil, though a military official says the rate is slowing. The official says he estimates that it will likely take a few more days to complete the operations in Bint Jbeil, during which the division aims to kill the remaining few dozen operatives there and locate the terror group's infrastructure. Bint Jbeil is considered a Hezbollah symbol. During the Second Lebanon War in 2006, the IDF battled Hezbollah in the town but failed to fully capture it. Earlier, in May 2000, after the IDF withdrew from southern Lebanon following an 18-year occupation, then-Hezbollah chief Hassan Nasrallah delivered a victory speech in Bint Jbeil, where he infamously described Israel as "weaker than a spider web." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian：据以色列国防军称，以军已基本完成对黎巴嫩南部真主党据点宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）的占领，在此过程中击毙了该地区100多名恐怖组织成员。宾特朱拜勒的行动由第98师及其伞兵和突击旅，以及吉瓦提（Givati）步兵旅领导。以军表示，最初对该镇进行了隔离和包围，以防止真主党增援或逃跑。据以军估计，在行动开始前，宾特朱拜勒地区至少有150名真主党武装人员，包括该恐怖组织精锐拉德万部队（Radwan Force）的成员。一位军方官员表示，第98师在确保该镇安全的过程中还执行了几次突击行动。“在过去的一周里，部队完成了包围并对宾特朱拜勒镇发起了进攻，”以军在一份声明中说。“部队在近距离战斗和空中打击中消灭了100多名真主党恐怖组织的恐怖分子，摧毁了数十个恐怖基础设施，并在该地区发现了数百件武器，”以军说。自以军开始对宾特朱拜勒发动进攻以来，军方没有发现该镇对以色列发动的任何袭击。然而，以军部队确实遭到了来自宾特朱拜勒的真主党火力攻击，尽管一位军方官员表示攻击频率正在放缓。该官员估计，完成宾特朱拜勒的行动可能还需要几天时间，在此期间，该师的目标是消灭那里剩余的几十名武装人员并定位该恐怖组织的基础设施。宾特朱拜勒被认为是真主党的象征。在2006年第二次黎巴嫩战争期间，以军曾在该镇与真主党作战，但未能完全占领它。早些时候，在2000年5月以军结束18年占领撤出黎巴嫩南部后，时任真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉在宾特朱拜勒发表了胜利演讲，他臭名昭著地将以色列描述为“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。推文

text: ELINT News RT @manniefabian : The Israeli military has captured Bint Jbeil's stadium, where in 2000, then-Hezbollah chief Hassan Nasrallah delivered a victory speech following the IDF's withdrawal from southern Lebanon, during which he infamously described Israel as "weaker than a spider web." "Bint Jbeil 2000: There was someone here who spoke and boasted about webs and spiders. Today, that man no longer exists, the stadium is gone, and his words are worth nothing," says 98th Division commander Brig. Gen. Guy Levy in a missive to troops. "Bint Jbeil 2026: Our forces control the area, destroying terror infrastructure and dozens of terrorists," he says. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian：以色列军队已经占领了宾特朱拜勒的体育场，2000年以军撤出黎巴嫩南部后，时任真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉曾在此发表胜利演讲，并臭名昭著地将以色列描述为“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。“宾特朱拜勒2000：曾经有人在这里谈论并吹嘘蛛网和蜘蛛。今天，那个人已经不存在了，体育场也不复存在，他的话一文不值，”第98师指挥官盖伊·列维（Guy Levy）准将在给部队的信中说。“宾特朱拜勒2026：我们的部队控制了该地区，摧毁了恐怖基础设施和数十名恐怖分子，”他说。

text: Open Source Intel NEW: An Iranian-directed spy built explosives in Haifa and planned a bus bombing. Gaidarov, 22, ran a makeshift lab in 2 apartments in the same building, producing TATP (highly unstable explosive compound) daily, sometimes hundreds of grams per batch, accumulating about 10 kg. According to the charges, he knew the explosives were intended for attacks, including against public figures and crowded civilian locations such as bus stops. In 1 test, he and an accomplice detonated an improvised device in an underground parking lot, filmed the blast, and fled due to the force of the explosion. @ lee_ayash tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）最新消息：一名受伊朗指使的间谍在海法制造炸药并计划炸毁公共汽车。22岁的盖达罗夫（Gaidarov）在同一栋大楼的2间公寓里经营一个临时实验室，每天生产TATP（高度不稳定的爆炸性化合物），每批有时数百克，累计约10公斤。根据指控，他知道这些炸药是用于袭击的，包括针对公众人物和公共汽车站等拥挤的平民场所。在一次测试中，他和一名同伙在地下停车场引爆了一个简易装置，拍摄了爆炸过程，并因爆炸威力而逃离。@ lee_ayash 推文

text: Türkiye Warns Israel: "We Know What Netanyahu Wants in Syria" Türkiye’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan accused Israel of exploiting war to expand territory, warning it is now casting Türkiye as its next enemy. He signalled Ankara is preparing for Israel’s "clear" ambitions in Syria while denouncing its growing ties with Greece. READ MORE
text_zh: 土耳其警告以色列：“我们知道内塔尼亚胡在叙利亚想要什么” 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）指责以色列利用战争扩张领土，并警告称以色列现在正将土耳其视为下一个敌人。他暗示安卡拉正在为以色列在叙利亚的“明确”野心做准备，同时谴责其与希腊日益密切的关系。阅读更多

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 Hungary is an unfriendly country - Peskov answering a question about whether the Kremlin will not congratulate Peter Magyar on his victory. We do not send congratulations to unfriendly countries. And Hungary is an unfriendly country, it supports sanctions against us At the same time, he noted that Russia is interested in building good relations with Hungary, as with all European countries. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 匈牙利是一个不友好的国家——佩斯科夫在回答克里姆林宫是否会祝贺彼得·马扎尔获胜的问题时说。我们不会向不友好的国家发送祝贺。匈牙利是一个不友好的国家，它支持对我们实施制裁。同时，他指出，俄罗斯有兴趣与匈牙利建立良好的关系，就像与所有欧洲国家一样。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has released footage showing the killing of a Hezbollah fighter in Bint Jbeil using a FPV drone. Troops of the Egoz commando unit identified and killed a alleged group planning drone attacks on Israeli forces. A short while later, another fighter was killed by an FPV drone. In a separate incident, the Maglan commando unit identified three fighters, who were killed in a precision airstrike. The IDF also destroyed a loaded launcher ready to fire at Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方发布了视频，显示使用FPV无人机在宾特朱拜勒击毙了一名真主党战士。Egoz突击部队的士兵识别并击毙了一个计划对以军发动无人机袭击的疑似小组。不久之后，另一名战士被FPV无人机击毙。在另一起事件中，Maglan突击部队识别出三名战士，他们在一场精确空袭中被击毙。以军还摧毁了一个准备向以色列开火的装载发射器。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: The U.S. military has sent a formal notice to mariners detailing enforcement of the naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea, east of the Strait of Hormuz. The blockade applies to all vessels regardless of flag. Any ship entering or exiting the restricted area without authorisation may be stopped, diverted or seized. Free passage through the strait itself to non‑Iranian destinations will be maintained. Humanitarian shipments of food, medicine and essential goods will be permitted subject to inspection. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：美军已向海员发出正式通知，详细说明在霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿曼湾和阿拉伯海执行海上封锁的情况。封锁适用于所有船只，无论悬挂何种旗帜。任何未经授权进入或离开限制区域的船只都可能被拦截、改道或扣押。将维持通过海峡本身前往非伊朗目的地的自由通行。在接受检查的前提下，允许人道主义食品、药品和必需品运输。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Special documentation of a precise drone strike: Commando Unit forces eliminated terrorists who were operating against our forces Commando Unit forces continue their activity in the Bint Jbeil area to expand the security zone. Maglan Unit forces located and eliminated yesterday three armed terrorists with the aid of advanced observation means. The terrorists were on their way to carry out a terror attack against IDF forces in the immediate timeframe and were eliminated in a precise aerial strike>> MUST WATCH 🔴 IDF releases video of an FPV drone strike eliminating a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以军：精确无人机打击的特别记录：突击部队消灭了针对我军行动的恐怖分子。突击部队继续在宾特朱拜勒地区开展活动以扩大安全区。Maglan部队在先进观察手段的帮助下，昨天定位并消灭了三名武装恐怖分子。恐怖分子正准备在近期对以军发动恐怖袭击，并在一次精确的空中打击中被消灭>> 必须观看 🔴 以军发布视频，显示FPV无人机打击消灭了黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒的一名真主党武装人员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 - 开源情报（Open Source Intel）推文

text: Open Source Intel 10 AM IS IN TWO HOURS. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）上午10点还有两个小时。推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 IDF releases video of an FPV drone strike eliminating a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）必须观看 🔴 以军发布视频，显示FPV无人机打击消灭了黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒的一名真主党武装人员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043660800607318050/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Head of Iran's Judiciary, Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje'i: Iran's Judiciary Switches to Full Wartime Mode Against Spies & Traitors 🔹 In dealing with spies, treacherous elements, and the invading enemy’s foot soldiers, our formation is completely wartime and matches the conditions of war . 🔹 While respecting the law and justice, we will show maximum firmness and speed in handling their cases. These files are no longer subject to normal peacetime procedures. 🔹 Until further notice, the Judiciary will maintain a wartime formation in cases involving enemy collaborators . We operate under war rules, not ordinary ones.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗司法总监吴拉姆-侯赛因·穆赫辛尼-埃杰伊：伊朗司法机构针对间谍和叛徒切换到全面战时模式 🔹 在处理间谍、叛国分子和入侵敌人的步兵时，我们的编制完全是战时的，符合战争条件。🔹 在尊重法律和正义的同时，我们将以最大的坚定和速度处理他们的案件。这些档案不再受正常的和平时期程序约束。🔹 在另行通知之前，司法机构将在涉及敌方合作者的案件中保持战时编制。我们按照战争规则运作，而不是普通规则。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇳🇬 🇮🇷 🇾🇪 ⚡️ Sheikh Zakzaky: The Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb Belong to the Nations of Iran and Yemen Leader of the Islamic Movement in Nigeria: 🔹 The Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb are not ownerless territories; they belong to the nations of Iran and Yemen. 🔹 We call on the aggressor groups to withdraw, admit their defeat, and abandon any thought of launching new acts of aggression.
text_zh: 🇳🇬 🇮🇷 🇾🇪 ⚡️ 扎克扎基（Zakzaky）谢赫：霍尔木兹海峡和曼德海峡属于伊朗和也门人民。尼日利亚伊斯兰运动领导人：🔹 霍尔木兹海峡和曼德海峡不是无主领土；它们属于伊朗和也门人民。🔹 我们呼吁侵略集团撤军，承认失败，并放弃任何发动新侵略行为的想法。

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Five Chinese COSCO tankers scheduled to transit the Strait of Hormuz this week are now stuck and will not proceed until the situation clears up
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 原定于本周通过霍尔木兹海峡的五艘中国中远海运（COSCO）油轮现在被困，在局势明朗之前不会继续航行

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy parliament speaker, Ali Nikzad, said the goal of the United States in the Isfahan operation was to seize uranium, but they failed. He stated that Iran was ready to demonstrate goodwill by diluting 450 kilograms of enriched uranium – not handing it over. In previous negotiations, a consortium for uranium dilution with US and Saudi participation was planned, but they backed out. He also noted that the U.S. proposed establishing a legal framework for the Strait of Hormuz that would include Americans, adding: “What do they have to do with the strait?” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会副议长阿里·尼克扎德（Ali Nikzad）表示，美国在伊斯法罕行动的目标是夺取铀，但他们失败了。他表示，伊朗准备通过稀释450公斤浓缩铀来展示善意——而不是移交。在之前的谈判中，曾计划建立一个有美国和沙特参与的铀稀释财团，但他们退出了。他还指出，美国提议为霍尔木兹海峡建立一个包括美国人在内的法律框架，并补充说：“他们与海峡有什么关系？” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: The ceasefire with Iran could end quickly.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：与伊朗的停火可能很快结束。

text: EU's von der Leyen: Moving to qualified majority voting in foreign policy is an important way to avoid systematic blockages as we've seen in the past. We should use the momentum now really to move forward on that topic.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：在外交政策中转向特定多数表决是避免像过去那样系统性阻碍的重要方式。我们现在应该利用这一势头，真正推动该议题向前发展。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli military lawyer Idan Dvir has been indicted for sexually exploiting at least ten female soldiers and pre‑recruits whom he represented. According to the indictment, he offered to waive legal fees of between 2,000 and 10,000 shekels in exchange for sexual acts, and in some cases sent a price list detailing the value of each act. In one instance, he asked a soldier: “If I release you today, do I deserve compensation?” He also allegedly drove a client to his home and forced sexual acts on her. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列军事律师伊丹·德维尔（Idan Dvir）因性剥削至少十名他所代表的女兵和预备役人员而被起诉。根据起诉书，他提出以性行为换取2,000至10,000谢克尔的法律费用减免，并在某些情况下发送了一份详细说明每项行为价值的价目表。有一次，他问一名士兵：“如果我今天释放你，我应该得到补偿吗？”他还被指控开车将一名客户带回家并强迫她进行性行为。@wfwitness

text: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 “我不怕特朗普政府，也不怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信这就是我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。” - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that Israel will only release Lebanese prisoners through force. Al‑Mousawi emphasised that Hezbollah has deep experience with Israel and knows how it negotiates every comma and period, and therefore Hezbollah’s agenda is different. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离开来，且只有国家掌握决定权……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Mousawi）表示，该组织与以色列任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩土地。“除非受到武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒土上移开，”他表示，并补充说以色列只会通过武力释放黎巴嫩囚犯。穆萨维强调，真主党对以色列有深刻的了解，知道它如何就每一个逗号和句号进行谈判，因此真主党的议程是不同的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he spoke with U.S. Vice President JD Vance, who reported that talks collapsed because Iran violated the agreement to open the Strait of Hormuz after a ceasefire. The U.S. central demand is the removal…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli army radio noted a significant nuance in Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s remarks: The US demand is for no uranium enrichment in Iran “in the coming years, and that could be decades” – not a permanent ban. This suggests a sunset clause similar to the 2015 JCPOA, which limited enrichment for 10 years. Trump withdrew from that agreement in 2018 precisely because it allowed Iran to resume advanced enrichment after a set period. The report questions whether the Trump administration is now advancing a deal that includes the same problematic sunset provision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他与美国副总统JD·万斯进行了交谈，万斯报告称谈判破裂，因为伊朗违反了停火后开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议。美国的核心要求是清除……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台指出了内塔尼亚胡总理言论中的一个重要细微差别：美国的要求是伊朗“在未来几年，可能是几十年内”不得进行铀浓缩——而不是永久禁止。这表明存在类似于2015年《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA）的日落条款，该条款限制了10年的浓缩活动。特朗普在2018年退出该协议正是因为它允许伊朗在一段特定时间后恢复先进浓缩活动。该报道质疑特朗普政府现在是否正在推进一项包含同样有问题的日落条款的协议。@wfwitness

text: EU's von der Leyen on Hungary: The people of Hungary have spoken, and they have reclaimed their European path. Our union is stronger and more united; it was an exceptional evening yesterday.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩谈匈牙利：匈牙利人民已经发声，他们夺回了自己的欧洲道路。我们的联盟更加强大和团结；昨天是一个非凡的夜晚。

text: EU's von der Leyen: We need to scale up the homegrown, affordable, reliable energy—this is the wide range of different renewables we have, but it is also the nuclear.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：我们需要扩大本土的、负担得起的、可靠的能源——这就是我们拥有的各种可再生能源，但也包括核能。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Zionist media reported that a Hezbollah missile struck the settlement of Karmiel.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义媒体报道称，一枚真主党导弹击中了卡尔米尔（Karmiel）定居点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature."…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision to negotiate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 以色列和黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿举行，级别为大使级。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅（Ghassan Salamé）表示，会议不是为了谈判，而是为了‘后勤性质的讨论或会谈’……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离开来，且只有国家掌握谈判决定权。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu compares nuclear facilities to extermination camps: If we had not acted, then places like Natanz, Fordow, and Bushehr would be remembered like Auschwitz, Majdanek, and Sobibor.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡将核设施比作灭绝营：如果我们没有采取行动，那么纳坦兹、福尔多和布什尔等地就会像奥斯威辛、马伊达内克和索比堡一样被铭记。

text: Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister…" ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said. The proposal remains under internal and inter‑agency review. “The authority, control, and supervision of Indonesian airspace remains fully in the hands of Indonesia,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以授予美国军用飞机进入其领空的权限，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）将与印尼国防部长会面……” ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未批准美国军用飞机进入其领空。该部发言人表示，全面飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，也不具有法律约束力。该提案仍在内部和跨部门审查中。他补充说：“印尼领空的权威、控制和监督权完全掌握在印尼手中。” @wfwitness
